boxName: Engine compartment cold zone - Start/Stop Side A
boxDescription: • Fuses A1 and A2 are of the "MEGA Fuse" type and must be replaced in a workshop 2 . • Fuses 1-11 are of the "MidiFuse" type and must be replaced in a workshop 2 . • Fuse 12 is of the "Mini Fuse" type.

boxName: Engine compartment cold zone - Start/Stop Side B
